title: Five Great Novels (incl. Three Stigmata) — Page 4
raw_text:
ACKNOWLEDGMENTS
Excerpt from "The Other Side of the Brain: An Appositional
Mind" by Joseph E. Bogen, M.D., which appeared in _Bulletin
of the Los Angeles Neurological Societies_, Vol. 34, No. 3,
July 1969. Used by permission. Excerpt from "The Split Brain
in Man" by Michael S. Gazzaniga which appeared in
_Scientific American_, August 1967, Vol. 217. Used by
permission. Untitled poem reprinted from _Heinrich Heine:
Lyric Poems and Ballads_, translated by Ernst Feise.
Copyright 1961 by the University of Pittsburgh Press. Used
by permission of the University of Pittsburgh Press. Other
German quotes from Goethe's _Faust_, Part one, and from
Beethoven's opera _Fidelio_.
